title: CLIFFHANGER — Eva pivots to tennis tomorrow
prompt: Mid-shot inside @jeep-interior, golden afternoon sunlight through the windows. @Mama already in the driver seat (LEFT-FRONT) holding a paper-wrapped burger to her mouth, taking a bite, eyes closed in bliss. @Sara already in the rear right seat, sipping a tall pink strawberry milkshake through a wide blue straw, cheeks puffed. @Eva already in the rear left seat, mid-bite into a smaller burger, ketchup smudged on her cheek. The @weber-tray is clipped to the driver's side window frame holding the rest of the food. Eva (mouth full, muffled, ketchup on her cheek): "...so... soccer practice TOMORROW?" Sara (lowering her shake, smug smirk): "YEP. And we're bringing TENNIS rackets too — just in case!" Mama (mid-chew, looking back in the mirror): "Or maybe pickleball next week?" Eva (mouth wide open, burger forgotten): "WHAT IS PICKLEBALL?!" Sara cracks up laughing.
